title: Sweet Velvety Kiwi Vegan Panna Cotta
description: A sweet and velvety Filipino-inspired dish featuring kiwifruit in a smooth vegan dessert that's perfect for romantic evenings.

ingredients.name: 2 cups almond milk
ingredients.notes: ensure it's fully heated before adding other ingredients

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons maple syrup or agave nectar
1/4 cup cornstarch
ingredients.notes: use water-based consistency for easier handling

ingredients.name: Coarse sugar or powdered ginger for decoration (optional)

instructions: Peel the kiwi fruits and cut them into small pieces.
In a blender, combine the peeled kiwi with almond milk, maple syrup/agave nectar, cornstarch, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into individual serving dishes or ramekins.
Cover with plastic wrap to prevent forming a skin on top. Place in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or overnight to chill and thicken.
Just before serving, drizzle some vanilla extract over each panna cotta as desired.
Decorate with coarse sugar or powdered ginger if using.
